text:
- Update to 1.81
- Fix CONFLICTS to make portlint happy
- Patch Makefile so post-install actually works
   - Need to specify ARCH install dir in post port and package to find library
   - https://rt.cpan.org/Ticket/Display.html?id=69553

Added file(s):
- files/patch-Makefile.PL.in

Port maintainer (skv@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
